title: Floral Caramel Middle Eastern Stir-fry
description: A monsoon-inspired, floral-flavored dish featuring plum jam and dumplings in a low-calorie-friendly, crisp stir-fry sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix plum jam with vegetable broth. Season with low-sodium soy sauce and stir in minced garlic and chopped green onions.
Add palm sugar and rice vinegar to the mixture. Stir well until all ingredients are combined and heated through.
Bring dumplings to a boil in simmering water for 2 minutes, then remove from heat. Add dumplings directly into the marinade and gently mix to coat evenly.
Simmer everything together over medium heat for about 3-5 minutes or until dumplings are fully cooked but still tender.
Serve hot with extra green onions as garnish.
